articles.title: OpenAI and Anthropic push faster model release cadence
articles.snippet: Model labs are accelerating release cycles while competing on quality, latency and tooling.

articles.title: Foundation model benchmarks shift toward multimodal and reasoning workloads
articles.snippet: Benchmarks now emphasize agentic and multimodal tasks rather than single-shot accuracy.

articles.title: Perplexity and OpenAI race to productize computer-using agents
articles.snippet: The new wave of products emphasizes browser control, workflow automation and human review.

articles.title: Agent frameworks converge on MCP-style tool interoperability
articles.snippet: Tool calling and protocol compatibility are becoming table stakes across agent platforms.

articles.title: HBM memory and packaging suppliers emerge as AI infrastructure bottlenecks
articles.snippet: Investors are tracking memory vendors, advanced packaging and hyperscaler capex for AI demand.

articles.title: Tesla, SpaceX and robotics suppliers gain attention as physical AI theme expands
articles.snippet: The physical AI narrative is widening beyond labs into vehicles, robots and industrial systems.
